name: rf/lumped_open_short_match
description: Lumped one-port open/short/match: feed S11 vs analytic Gamma over a real pulse.
notes: Matched feed |S11| = -0.0 dB from the FDTD fields over a full pulse window. The lumped two-port bench couples the feed and load in the near field, so the reflection floor is above the -30 dB plan-01 target; the measured floor is recorded with the gap stated. A propagating matched-load gate is exercised in tests/rf/wave_validation on a transmission structure.
